statement: In every magma, Equation 711 (`x = y * (y * ((x * z) * z))`) implies Equation 3567 (`x * y = y * ((z * x) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0161
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op y (op (op x z) z)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op y (op (op z x) z))
